evals.prompt: I have an Amazon FBA business. My IPI score dropped to 450 and I'm getting storage limits. I have 500 units of slow-moving inventory that's been sitting for 4 months. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Analysis of IPI score issues, aged inventory removal strategies, storage fee calculations, and actionable recommendations to improve IPI above 500

evals.prompt: Calculate safety stock for my product. Average daily sales: 50 units. Lead time: 14 days. I want 95% service level. My supplier is sometimes late by up to 5 days.
evals.expected_output: Safety stock calculation using statistical formula, reorder point recommendation, consideration of lead time variability

evals.prompt: I sell on both Amazon FBA and Shopify with a 3PL. Should I consolidate to one fulfillment method or keep the hybrid setup? Monthly orders: 2000 Amazon, 800 Shopify.
evals.expected_output: Cost comparison between hybrid vs consolidated, pros/cons analysis, channel-specific considerations, recommendation based on order volume

evals.prompt: Do an ABC analysis for my inventory. I have 150 SKUs. Top 20 SKUs make 65% of revenue, next 40 make 25%, the rest make 10%. How should I prioritize?
evals.expected_output: ABC classification breakdown, inventory management strategies per category, reorder frequency recommendations, storage location optimization

evals.prompt: My TikTok Shop is growing fast. Getting 100+ orders daily now. Currently dropshipping but fulfillment is slow (7-10 days). Should I switch to TikTok Shop Fulfillment or use a 3PL?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of dropshipping vs TikTok Fulfillment vs 3PL, shipping speed requirements, cost analysis, scalability considerations
